tasks.name: Common Library Upgrade
tasks.description: Upgrade shared library to new version

action.title: [Infra] Upgrade Common Library v2.0
action.body:
## Overview
Upgrade the shared common library to v2.0.

## Changes
- Breaking changes in auth module
- New logging interface
- Performance improvements

## Affected Services
- UserService
- OrderService
- PaymentService
- NotificationService

tasks.name: UserService Update
tasks.description: Update UserService to use new common library

action.title: [Service] Update UserService for Common Lib v2.0
action.body:
## Overview
Update UserService to use common library v2.0.

## Parent Issue
Depends on: #$.common_lib_upgrade.output.number

## Tasks
- [ ] Update dependencies
- [ ] Migrate auth module usage
- [ ] Update logging calls
- [ ] Run unit tests
- [ ] Deploy to staging

tasks.name: E2E Testing
tasks.description: Run end-to-end tests across all services

action.title: [Test] E2E Tests for Common Lib v2.0 Migration
action.body:
## Overview
Run E2E tests after all services are updated.

## Dependencies
- UserService: #$.user_service_update.output.number
- OrderService: #$.order_service_update.output.number
- PaymentService: #$.payment_service_update.output.number
- NotificationService: #$.notification_service_update.output.number

## Test Scenarios
- [ ] User registration → Order placement → Payment → Notification
- [ ] Cross-service authentication
- [ ] Logging consistency
- [ ] Performance benchmarks
